commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5f105f57356affd480067f5541356919e36a05b1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards OpenRouter `models` fallback arrays from provider config, model params, or request extra params and adds hook tests for precedence, filtering, and truncation.

PR surface: Source +42, Tests +137. Total +179 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible for the review finding: configure more than four OpenRouter fallback models and the branch's slice drops later entries before transport. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor revision and real provider proof are needed; automation cannot supply the external OpenRouter evidence for this PR.

target.title: feat(openrouter): support models fallback array for automatic failover
target.author: vinitasher

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
